immediate_actions.step: Call 911 immediately — or send someone to call while you start CPR
Send someone to find an AED
immediate_actions.note: Do not delay CPR to search far for AED

immediate_actions.step: 30 hard chest compressions at 100-120/min, at least 2 inches deep
immediate_actions.note: Lower half of breastbone, arms straight, allow full recoil
Compression-only CPR is acceptable if untrained or uncomfortable

next_steps.when: if another person is available to reduce fatigue

next_steps.step: Apply AED pads and follow voice prompts as soon as AED arrives
Resume CPR immediately after each shock
